spriteVersions.commitMessage:
sprites: improve shotgun guy death. (#1541)
This has bothered me for years but it goes by so quick you never really notice it: the shotgun guy's entire abdomen and pelvic area are missing in multiple frames. The body is now restored.
The blood on the corpse is also made a little more consistent, and treads have been added to the soles of the boots.

sprites: new gib animations (zombie and shotgunner)
Removed empty spaces, added propper offsets (courtesy of Matt)

sprites: new gib animations (zombie and shotgunner)
Improved gib animations for the aforementioned enemies.

spriteVersions.commitMessage:
Burn all GIFs: Convert everything to PNGs.
DeuTex 5 now supports these, and we can use real transparency indexes
in the files too, so no more ugly cyan background!
sprites: edit the shotgunner corpse to be a bit sorter
sprites: add raymoohawk's new shotgun zombie

Move SoK's shotgun zombie to the attic
These are the versions before raymoohawk's edits.
